inputs.label: Average Cycle Length
inputs.businessContext: The average number of days between the first day of one period and the first day of the next.

inputs.label: Luteal Phase Length
inputs.businessContext: The number of days between ovulation and the start of the next period, typically constant for an individual.

inputs.label: Sperm Lifespan
inputs.businessContext: Maximum number of days sperm can survive in the female reproductive tract.

inputs.label: Egg Lifespan
inputs.businessContext: Number of days the egg is viable after ovulation.

outputs.primary: Fertile window: days ${fertileStart} to ${fertileEnd} of the cycle (assuming cycle start is day 1).
breakdown: Fertile window start: ${fertileStart} (based on sperm lifespan of ${spermLifeSpan} days)
Fertile window end: ${fertileEnd} (based on egg lifespan of ${eggLifeSpan} day(s))
